---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)

```

## Undifferentiated

### Supernatant

```{r}

data <- read_xlsx("./data/raw/ASC_SN_TLR10_Light_Report.xlsx", sheet = 1) %>%
  mutate(PG.Genes = str_split_i(PG.Genes, ";", 1))

quant_data <- data %>% select(7:18) 

```
